steps.t: Crágan Bris can be found in the hills west of Hlídborg in Câr Bronach. You should travel to Crágan Bris.
Crágan Bris can be found in the hills west of Hlídborg in Câr Bronach. You should talk to Skálgrund at Crágan Bris.
Crágan Bris can be found in the hills west of Hlídborg in Câr Bronach. You should feed the rams at Crágan Bris.

Mézto and be found at Grúmachath in central Câr Bronach. You should return to Mézto.
